message:
feat: Add workerd integration tests proving PyMode runs on Cloudflare

Uses @cloudflare/vitest-pool-workers to run 42 tests inside workerd —
the same runtime as production Cloudflare Workers. Every test executes
real Python code through python.wasm with full WASI filesystem support.

Tests cover:
- Basic execution (print, arithmetic, strings, f-strings)
- Data structures (lists, dicts, sets, tuples, comprehensions)
- Classes and OOP (inheritance, slots, methods)
- Standard library (json, re, math, collections, itertools, functools,
  hashlib, datetime, textwrap, string)
- Error handling (try/except, custom exceptions, syntax/runtime errors)
- Real-world patterns (JSON APIs, routing, validation, data transforms)
- Advanced features (generators, decorators, context managers, lambdas)
- Stability (large data, recursive algorithms, sequential requests)
